changeSet.author: openelis-tradmed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true

changeSet.comment: Create Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab notebook template

column.name: title
column.value: Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab

column.name: objective
column.value: Sample-centric workflows for traditional and modern medicine research, from intake through product formulation

column.name: protocol
column.value: Traditional Medicine Research

column.name: content
column.value: Complete workflow for traditional medicine research lab including sample intake, authentication, storage, preparation, extraction, analysis, testing, formulation, and archival

delete.where: title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true

changeSet.author: openelis-tradmed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 1

changeSet.comment: Create Sample Intake, Registration & Authentication page for Traditional Medicine notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Sample Intake, Registration & Authentication

column.name: instructions
column.value: Register traditional/modern medicine samples with full metadata and authenticate through botanical verification or expert identification. Confirmed samples advance to Storage.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 1

changeSet.author: openelis-tradmed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 2

changeSet.comment: Create Sample Storage & Herbarium Placement page for Traditional Medicine notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Sample Storage & Herbarium Placement

column.name: instructions
column.value: Assign proper storage or permanent herbarium placement for the sample based on its type and intended use.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 2

changeSet.author: openelis-tradmed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 3

changeSet.comment: Create Sample Preparation for Analysis page for Traditional Medicine notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Sample Preparation for Analysis

column.name: instructions
column.value: Prepare raw material for extraction or analysis through physical processing such as grinding, chopping, drying, or powdering.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 3

changeSet.author: openelis-tradmed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 4

changeSet.comment: Create Extraction, Filtration & Concentration page for Traditional Medicine notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Extraction, Filtration & Concentration

column.name: instructions
column.value: Generate extracts suitable for analysis or production through solvent extraction, filtration, and concentration processes. Supports aliquoting for parallel pathways.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 4

changeSet.author: openelis-tradmed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 5

changeSet.comment: Create Analytical Pathway page for Traditional Medicine notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Analytical Pathway

column.name: instructions
column.value: Perform advanced compound profiling when required, including fractionation, identification/isolation, purification, and characterization. Optional - samples can skip to Testing.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 5

changeSet.author: openelis-tradmed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 6

changeSet.comment: Create Product Development & Testing page for Traditional Medicine notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Product Development & Testing

column.name: instructions
column.value: Assess safety, efficacy, and readiness for formulation through phytochemical screening, toxicity studies, and efficacy testing.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 6

changeSet.author: openelis-tradmed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 7

changeSet.comment: Create Formulation of Medical Product page for Traditional Medicine notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Formulation of Medical Product

column.name: instructions
column.value: Create final traditional/modern medicine products including capsules, tinctures, ointments, teas, and other formulations.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 7

changeSet.author: openelis-tradmed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 8

changeSet.comment: Create Storage, Reporting & Archival page for Traditional Medicine notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Storage, Reporting & Archival

column.name: instructions
column.value: Close the lifecycle while maintaining traceability. Store finished products, generate reports, and archive data.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 8
